Cookie notice
We use cookies to run our websites, personalize your experience, and deliver relevant advertising. Learn more in our notices:
cookie notice
privacy notice
Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
Reject Non-Essential
Accept All
Your Global Privacy Control signal has been honored, and you have been opted out of the sale or sharing of your personal information.
Cookie settings
We use cookies and similar technologies on our websites and apps. Click on the different category headings below to find out more and change your choices. Blocking some types of these technologies may impact your experience on our websites and apps, and the services we are able to offer. Find out more in our notices:
cookie notice
privacy notice
Allow all cookies
Manage Consent Preferences
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

Pricing plan details and offer terms
Xero reserves the right to change pricing at any time. All prices are listed in USD and do not include applicable taxes. Taxes will be calculated based on your billing address before you enter your payment information. Your monthly recurring total will be updated accordingly in the following steps. Xero subscriptions auto-renew monthly until they are cancelled. If you later decide to change to a less expensive plan you can do so 1 month after upgrading.
*New customers get 80% off for the first 3 months, then Xero’s regular price will apply and auto-renew monthly until cancelled. Only available to customers in the United States purchasing their first organization on xero.com using code DC8032614GL. Discount applies to base Early, Growing, Established plan subscriptions and does not apply to any additional charges for add‑ons, usage and payment fees, unless otherwise specified. This offer cannot be used with, or exchanged for, any other offer. Xero can change or cancel this offer at any time.
†Invoice limits for the Early plan apply to both approving and sending invoices. Transactions initiated by app partners may automatically contribute to your invoice limit.
^Payment fees apply to the use of online invoice payments. See
here
for more information.
**Median payment times of invoices with a payment service included and sent via SMS by customers using Xero in US from 9/1/2024 to 3/31/2025 (compared to invoices sent by email and without payment service included).
a. ††Payment fees may apply to the use of online bill payments. Standard ACH payments are included in Xero Early, Growing and Established plans (fees apply for other payment methods). Included payments apply to standard ACH payments in USD and excludes same day ACH, international or cross border payments. Any payment fees are in addition to your Xero monthly subscription amount and are not eligible for subscription discounts and offers. Fees exclude applicable taxes. See
here
for more information.
See our terms of use for details
Hubdoc terms of use

Included payments apply to standard ACH payments in USD and excludes same day ACH, international or cross border payments. Any payment fees are in addition to your Xero monthly subscription amount and are not eligible for subscription discounts and offers. Fees exclude applicable taxes. See
here
for more information.
See our terms of use for details
Hubdoc terms of use
Why choose Xero vs QuickBooks?
Xero's user friendly layout, collaborative features and US-based team make it the ideal Quickbooks alternative to switch to.
Compare Xero vs. QuickBooks
.
1
Tap to pay, mobile payments your way
Accept payments on the go with tap-to-pay functionality on both Android and iPhone - a feature QuickBooks can’t match.
2
Powerful business insights
Get visually rich, easy-to-understand analytics with Syft - available on all Xero plans to help make smarter decisions.
3
Free personalized onboarding support
Kickstart your Xero journey with free, personalized onboarding from a Xero Coach for your first 90 days.
Gusto payroll plays nice with Xero
Use Gusto payroll to calculate pay and deductions, pay employees, simplify compliance, and update the Xero accounts.
Learn more about Gusto
Zero setup stress, free onboarding with a Xero Coach.
Sign up and get access to a real human who’ll help you set up Xero, connect your bank feeds, and turn your cash-flow and analytics dashboards into a clear view of your whole business.
Learn more about Xero coaches
Frequently asked questions
How does the one month free work?
Purchase any Xero plan and your first month will be free. Your free month begins once you finalize your business and set up in Xero. You will receive a reminder 7 days before your free month ends and then you will be charged for your second month and onwards. Xero subscriptions auto-renew monthly until they are cancelled.
Get Xero one month for free
Purchase any Xero plan and your first month will be free. Your free month begins once you finalize your business and set up in Xero. You will receive a reminder 7 days before your free month ends and then you will be charged for your second month and onwards. Xero subscriptions auto-renew monthly until they are cancelled.
Get Xero one month for free
Can I pay the subscription an

We use cookies and similar technologies on our websites and apps. Click on the different category headings below to find out more and change your choices. Blocking some types of these technologies may impact your experience on our websites and apps, and the services we are able to offer. Find out more in our notices:
cookie notice
privacy notice
Allow all cookies
Manage Consent Preferences
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

Projectworks connects time tracking, resourcing, invoicing, and forecasting in one project intelligence platform - empowering your firm to operate efficiently, protect margins, and scale with confidence.

4.96 out of 5 stars

Debtor management, Documents
RemitClear
5 out of 5 stars
3
Debtor management, Documents
RemitClear automates remittance matching for Xero. Upload a PDF, Excel, or CSV remittance and AI extracts every invoice line, matches it against open Xero invoices, and posts the payment with the original document attached. Handles 600+ line remittances, part payments, and credit deductions.

Gennai.io
5 out of 5 stars
2
Accountant tools, Bills and expenses
Gennai captures every supplier invoice from your inbox and pushes it into Xero as a draft bill, with the PDF attached and auto-categorized to your chart of accounts. Connect Gmail, Outlook or IMAP once. Save hours, never miss a deduction.

4.79 out of 5 stars

analysis.name: Xero
analysis.tagline: Know your numbers. Control your cash flow.
analysis.value_proposition: Cloud accounting software for small businesses that automates bookkeeping, invoicing, bill pay, and reporting with an AI finance partner.
analysis.ideal_customer: Small businesses, accountants, and bookkeepers needing cloud accounting with automated reconciliation, invoicing, and cash flow visibility

features.name: online invoicing
features.description: Send quotes and invoices with online payment acceptance

features.name: bill pay
features.description: Pay bills with free standard ACH included in business plans
features.evidence_quote: Free standard ACH bill payments are now included in Xero business plans

features.name: bank reconciliation
features.description: Reconcile bank transactions with automated matching

features.name: bank connections
features.description: Connect business bank accounts to Xero

features.name: smart document capture
features.description: Automatically pull bills and receipts into Xero

features.name: hubdoc data capture
features.description: Auto-capture bills and receipts via Hubdoc
features.evidence_quote: Pull bills and receipts into Xero automatically with Hubdoc

features.name: 1099 management
features.description: W-9 and 1099 management for US contractors

features.name: cash flow forecasting
features.description: 30-180 day cash flow forecast depending on tier

features.name: project time tracking
features.description: Track time and costs for projects
features.evidence_quote: Track time and costs for projects

features.name: expense claims
features.description: Employee expense and mileage claim management

features.name: free ach payments
features.evidence_quote: Make online bill payments (Domestic - Free ACH)

features.name: jax ai finance partner
features.description: AI financial superagent for routine tasks and insights
features.evidence_quote: Get more done with JAX, your AI finance partner

features.name: jax chat
features.description: AI chat interface for financial data queries

features.name: bill entry automation
features.evidence_quote: Automate bill entry and track bills

features.name: syft analytics
features.description: Advanced analytics powered by Syft (reports, forecasts, consolidations, budgets)

features.name: trend analysis
features.description: Smart data and insights with trend analysis
features.evidence_quote: Make confident business decisions with trend analysis

features.name: invoice reminders
features.evidence_quote: sending invoice reminders, Xero works for you

features.name: paperless record keeping
features.evidence_quote: All in one, paperless record keeping

features.name: xero hq
features.description: Practice management hub for accountants — clients and staff in one place
features.evidence_quote: Xero HQ — Clients and staff in one place

features.name: xero practice manager
features.evidence_quote: Xero Practice Manager — Manage your practice efficiently

features.name: xero cashbook & ledger
features.description: Starter plans for smaller clients (for accountants)
features.evidence_quote: Xero Cashbook & Ledger — A starter for smaller clients

features.name: xero app store
features.description: Marketplace of 1000+ business apps that integrate with Xero
features.evidence_quote: Xero App Store US — App Marketplace & Small Business Software Reviews

features.name: onboarding support
features.description: Xero Coaches for setup during first 90 days

features.name: industry solutions
features.description: Tailored features for construction, real estate, retail, and other industries

features.name: xero partner program
features.description: Program for accountants and bookkeepers with free Xero and rewards

differentiators: JAX AI finance partner (AI financial superagent)
Free standard ACH bill payments included in business plans
250,000+ accountants and bookkeepers on partner program
Xero Coaches onboarding specialists for first 90 days

recent_ships.what: Free standard ACH bill payments included in all business plans
recent_ships.source: Free standard ACH payments are now included in Xero business plans
Get more done with JAX, your AI finance partner

praised: Using apps saves us time and frees us up to work on the things we want to be working on — Emma Barton, COO of Mutual Muse
Strong ecosystem of highly-rated integrations (A2X 4.96, Paidnice 5.0, Syft 4.81)
complaints: G2 reviews page returned no accessible content (bot-blocked)
Hacker News results were all unrelated to Xero (Xerox parent-string false-positives) — no organic HN discussion surfaced

free_tier.limits: No free tier; 1 month free trial on any plan, 30-day trial standard

tiers.name: Early
tiers.headline_inclusions: 20 invoices, 5 bills, bank recon, reports, sales tax, 30-day cash flow forecast, free ACH

tiers.name: Growing
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited invoices/bills, auto-reconcile (beta), 60-day cash flow, dashboards, scorecards

tiers.name: Established
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Growing + multi-currency, projects, expenses, benchmarks, 180-day cash flow, international payments

pricing.notes: No per-user license fees — flat pricing regardless of seats. Promo: 80% off for first 3 months (Early $5, Growing $11, Established $18) OR one month free. Inventory Plus is an optional add-on across tiers. Accountant/bookkeeper plans (Cashbook, Ledger, Partner Hub) priced separately via partner program.
